sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Varonis Systems (VRNS) director awarded 7,224 restricted stock units
feed.summary: Varonis Systems (VRNS) director Kevin E. Comolli was awarded 7,224 restricted stock units (RSUs) on April 30, 2026, with a grant price of $0.00. These RSUs will vest on May 31, 2027, converting into common shares. Following this grant, Comolli directly holds 46,228 shares and indirectly holds 190,575 shares through living trusts.

feed.title: Varonis Systems (VRNS) director awarded 7,224 restricted stock units
feed.summary: Varonis Systems Inc. director Fred Van Den Bosch was granted 7,224 restricted stock units (RSUs) on April 30, 2026, with a stated price of $0.00 per share. These RSUs are scheduled to vest on May 31, 2027, at which point an equal number of common shares will be delivered to him. Following this grant, Van Den Bosch's directly held common stock position in VRNS totals 135,890 shares.

feed.title: Woodside struggling to sell LNG volumes at planned Louisiana export plant - Reuters (WDS:NYSE)
feed.summary: Woodside Energy is reportedly struggling to secure sales for liquefied natural gas volumes from its planned Louisiana export plant. The difficulty arises because Woodside is seeking liquefaction fees higher than the current prevailing U.S. market rates. This situation has been reported by Reuters.

feed.title: Assessing VEON (NasdaqGS:VEON) Valuation After Kyivstar’s Accelerated Ukraine Investment Program
feed.summary: VEON is under assessment after its Ukrainian subsidiary, Kyivstar, completed a $1.3 billion investment program ahead of schedule, exceeding its original commitment by 30%. Despite a recent 7.43% monthly share price return, the stock is down 5.62% year-to-date, though it has seen strong longer-term momentum with a 161.24% three-year total shareholder return. Analysts widely consider VEON undervalued, with a fair value of $79.52 against its current trading price of $49.74, driven by aggressive expansion in digital services in emerging markets.

feed.title: COPYRIGHT—10th Cir.: Netflix escapes the clutches of Tiger King lawsuit, as court affirms summary judgment on fair use and works made for hire grounds
feed.summary: This article discusses the 10th Circuit Court's affirmation of summary judgment in favor of Netflix in a "Tiger King" related copyright lawsuit. The court ruled that Netflix's use of copyrighted material constituted fair use and that some of the works in question were made for hire, thus exempting Netflix from infringement claims. This outcome allows Netflix to avoid further legal battles related to content featured in the popular documentary series.

feed.title: BXP (NYSE:BXP) Upgraded by Wall Street Zen to Hold Rating
feed.summary: Wall Street Zen has upgraded BXP (NYSE:BXP) from a "sell" to a "hold" rating, aligning with the current consensus "Hold" rating and an average analyst target of $73.05. Despite missing Q1 EPS estimates ($0.64 vs $1.58 consensus) but exceeding revenue expectations ($872.2M), the company provided Q2 guidance of $1.690–1.710 EPS. Notably, institutional ownership is high at 98.72%, with major funds increasing positions, even as insiders sold approximately $477K worth of shares in the last three months.

feed.title: Franklin Resources (NYSE:BEN) Rating Increased to Buy at Wall Street Zen
feed.summary: Wall Street Zen has upgraded Franklin Resources (NYSE:BEN) from a "hold" to a "buy" rating. This upgrade comes amidst mixed analyst sentiments, though the company recently surpassed quarterly earnings and revenue expectations. Franklin Resources is currently trading near the top of its 12-month range, with institutional investors showing continued interest in the stock.

feed.title: Alexandria Real Estate Equities (NYSE:ARE) Raised to Hold at Wall Street Zen
feed.summary: Wall Street Zen has upgraded Alexandria Real Estate Equities (ARE) from "sell" to "hold," though the stock's consensus rating remains "Hold" with an average target price of $55.08. This comes despite the company's Q1 results showing in-line EPS but a revenue miss and negative net margin, coupled with insider buying by its Chairman Joel S. Marcus. The stock is trading near its 12-month low, and the company has provided 2026 EPS guidance of $6.30-$6.50.

feed.title: NC Dominion Energy customers could see rate hike
feed.summary: Dominion Energy has proposed a rate hike in North Carolina that could increase residential customer bills by an average of $17 per month. The company attributes this increase to the rising costs of critical grid equipment and inflation. While customers express frustration, Dominion Energy notes that their current residential rate is 25% below the national average.

feed.title: SZCZEPANIAK Family Trust sells 1,573 shares on three dates (VEL)
feed.summary: The SZCZEPANIAK Family Trust reported routine 10b5-1 sales of Velocity Financial, Inc. (VEL) shares, selling 1,573 shares on three separate dates in February and January 2026 for total proceeds of over $89,000. These were plan-based dispositions rather than discretionary trades, as indicated in a Form 144 SEC filing. The filing also detailed 3,146 restricted stock awards dated January 23, 2025, and listed 39,235,281 shares outstanding as of May 1, 2026.

feed.title: 3 senior living communities change hands as Pennant adds 194 units
feed.summary: Pennant (NASDAQ: PNTG) announced the acquisition of operations for three assisted living communities in Arizona and Wisconsin, effective May 1, 2026, adding 194 units. These communities, now renamed Saguaro, Cardinal Lane, and Harbor Haven Senior Living, will operate under triple net leases. This expansion reflects Pennant's strategy for disciplined growth and operational excellence in key strategic markets.

feed.title: Trinity Industries Inc (TRN) Stock Up 11.1% but GF Value Says Ov
feed.summary: Trinity Industries Inc (TRN) shares rose 11.1% to $36.22, marking a 54.9% increase over the past year and a 39.8% year-to-date gain. However, GuruFocus's GF Value™ indicates the stock is significantly overvalued at $36.22 compared to its intrinsic value estimate of $22.51, suggesting a 60.9% downside. Despite strong momentum and profitability (GF Score™ of 82/100), its financial strength is low, and there has been no insider activity in the last three months.

feed.title: Tango Therapeutics (TNGX) director receives RSU and option grants as board compensation
feed.summary: Tango Therapeutics director Lee Sung received 12,300 restricted stock units (RSUs) and an option for 5,200 shares as part of his board compensation. The RSUs will vest in three equal annual installments starting January 2, 2027, and the stock option, with an exercise price of $22.06, will vest monthly over three years beginning January 2, 2026, both contingent on his continued service. This transaction is classified as routine non-employee director compensation rather than open-market trading.

feed.title: A Look At Trustmark (TRMK) Valuation After Recent Share Price Momentum
feed.summary: Trustmark (TRMK) stock has seen significant momentum, closing at $44.91 with a market value of $2.6 billion. Despite strong recent performance and an intrinsic value suggesting a substantial discount, its fair value is estimated at $45.20 based on steady revenue expansion, firm profit margins, and anticipated buybacks. Investors should consider regional concentration risks and rising noninterest expenses that could affect its margin before making investment decisions.

feed.title: Transportadora de Gas del Sur SA (TGS) Stock Down 4.1% but Still Overvalued -- GF Score: 94/100
feed.summary: Transportadora de Gas del Sur SA (TGS) shares dropped 4.1% to $29.27, yet GuruFocus assesses the stock as significantly overvalued with a GF Value™ of $19.90. Despite a strong GF Score™ of 94/100, driven by excellent profitability and growth, its valuation score is low at 3/10, and there have been no insider transactions in the past three months. Investors are cautioned that the current price does not reflect the intrinsic value.

feed.title: A Look at Synaptics Inc (SYNA) After 3.1% Gain -- GF Value $83.2
feed.summary: Synaptics Inc (SYNA) shares rose 3.1% to $96.50, nearing its 52-week high, but GuruFocus' GF Value™ indicates it is 15.9% overvalued at $83.23. Despite a GF Score™ of 79/100 suggesting above-average investment potential, insider selling of $1.2 million and the overvaluation warrant caution for investors. While its forward P/E of 18.6x is below its 5-year median, overall financial strength and profitability are rated as average.

feed.title: SS Innovations (NASDAQ: SSII) files $150M shelf, 5.02M shares registered for resale
feed.summary: SS Innovations International, Inc. (NASDAQ: SSII) has filed an S-3 registration statement to offer up to $150 million worth of securities and register 5,016,500 shares of common stock for resale by existing shareholders. The company will not receive proceeds from the resale of these shares, only if underlying warrants are exercised. This filing includes shares from a recent private placement and shares tied to warrants, with the company's CEO, Dr. Sudhir Srivastava, holding a controlling interest of approximately 55.85% of the voting power.

feed.title: Dollar Tree Shareholder Vote Tests Written Consent And Governance Priorities
feed.summary: A Dollar Tree shareholder has proposed allowing shareholders to act by written consent, a measure that will be voted on at the upcoming annual meeting. Management opposes the proposal, highlighting a governance clash over how quickly shareholders can influence company direction. The outcome of this vote will signal market sentiment on governance flexibility and may impact how Dollar Tree responds to corporate developments.

feed.title: WJ Wealth Management Sells 311686 Shares of Harbor Long Term Growers ETF
feed.summary: WJ Wealth Management, LLC sold 311,686 shares of the Harbor Long-Term Growers ETF (NYSE:WINN) in the first quarter of 2026, totaling an estimated $9.24 million. This transaction reduced the ETF's representation in the firm's total reportable U.S. equity assets to 0.42%. The WINN ETF focuses on U.S. equities with long-term growth prospects and has shown strong historical performance, advancing 92% over the last three years, equivalent to a 24.2% compound annual growth rate.

feed.title: Why Is Lululemon Stock Crashing and is it a Buying Opportunity?
feed.summary: Lululemon Athletica Inc. stock is reportedly crashing due to macroeconomic headwinds and trade barriers. While the article discusses whether this presents a buying opportunity, The Motley Fool's Stock Advisor team does not include Lululemon among their top 10 current stock recommendations, instead highlighting other stocks that have generated significant returns for investors.

feed.title: Boston Scientific AGM: $20B 2025 Sales, Governance Votes Pass, Special Meeting Proposals Fail
feed.summary: Boston Scientific's 2026 Annual Meeting highlighted its strong 2025 performance, including $20 billion in net sales and over $2 billion invested in R&D. Shareholders approved all governance measures, re-elected directors, and passed amendments to remove supermajority provisions and officer exculpation. However, both the company's and a stockholder's proposals for calling special meetings failed to pass, and the company acknowledged a 2026 securities-fraud class action regarding U.S. Electrophysiology growth projections.

feed.title: Insider Sell: Cameron Turtle Sells 15,000 Shares of Spyre Therapeutics Inc (SYRE)
feed.summary: Cameron Turtle, CEO of Spyre Therapeutics Inc (SYRE), sold 15,000 shares of the company on May 1, 2026, increasing his total insider sells over the past year to 120,000 shares with no purchases. Following this transaction, he now holds 612,540 shares. Shares were trading at $71.37 each at the time of the sale, reflecting a market cap of $5,987.693 million.

feed.title: Analysts Have Conflicting Sentiments on These Healthcare Companies: Cardinal Health (CAH) and Illumina (ILMN)
feed.summary: The article reports on conflicting analyst sentiments regarding healthcare companies Cardinal Health (CAH) and Illumina (ILMN). While Cardinal Health has lifted its 2026 outlook after strong Q3 results, with its EPS view raised to $10.70-$10.80, BofA lowered its price target to $240 from $260. The piece advises readers to discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks.

feed.title: Whetstone/Atterbury amend 8.6% stake in Sera Prognostics (NASDAQ: SERA)
feed.summary: Whetstone Capital Advisors, LLC and David Atterbury have amended their stake in Sera Prognostics (NASDAQ: SERA), now reporting beneficial ownership of 3,306,889 shares of Class A Common Stock, which represents 8.6% of the class. This update was disclosed in a Schedule 13G/A filing with the SEC, indicating shared voting and dispositive power over these shares. The filing, signed on May 1, 2026, reflects a passive investment and transparency regarding their holdings.

feed.title: Sezzle Inc. 2025 Executive Compensation, Governance, and Audit Disclosures – 10-K/A Annual Report Highlights
feed.summary: Sezzle Inc. (Nasdaq: SEZL) has filed an amendment to its 2025 Annual Report on Form 10-K/A, providing crucial details on executive compensation, corporate governance, and audit disclosures omitted from the initial filing. Key highlights include comprehensive executive compensation structures, high insider ownership of 48.8%, and the implementation of new SEC-mandated clawback policies for incentive-based compensation. The amendment also addresses the correction of prior financial errors and outlines robust audit committee oversight, all of which could significantly influence investor sentiment and market valuation.

feed.title: Shoals Technologies (SHLS) director awarded 22,671 RSUs with deferred delivery
feed.summary: Shoals Technologies Group director Robert K. Julian was awarded 22,671 restricted stock units (RSUs) of Class A Common Stock. These RSUs will vest at the 2027 shareholder meeting and be delivered 12 months after his separation from service, in line with his deferral election. Following this award, Julian now directly holds 104,096 shares.

feed.title: Essex Property Trust FFO Stability Tests Bullish Narratives On Margin And Earnings Pressure
feed.summary: Essex Property Trust (ESS) reported stable Q1 2026 funds from operations at US$278.0 million, yet analysts predict a significant drop in net profit margins from 34.6% to 20.7%. This contrasts with a long-term compound EPS growth of 15.2% annually, leading to mixed signals for investors. The article highlights potential support from stabilized West Coast multifamily assets but also flags concerns about recent margin compression, a one-off gain propping up profits, and weak interest coverage.

feed.title: Nasdaq’s Best Month Since 2002 Meets Fed Division, Inflation Risks - Advanced Micro Devices (NASDAQ:AMD)
feed.summary: April 2026 saw an extraordinary rally on Wall Street, with the Nasdaq 100 having its best month since 2002, driven by strong mega-cap tech earnings. However, this bullish sentiment was tempered by a divided Federal Reserve expressing concerns about inflation and an unwillingness to commit to rate cuts, leading to renewed fears of potential rate hikes. Economic data, including below-expectations Q1 GDP and a rise in the Fed's preferred inflation gauge to 3.2%, along with surging factory-gate prices fueled by oil costs, highlighted persistent inflation risks despite the market's strong performance.

feed.title: Defiance Quantum ETF Surges 73 Percent as Quantum Computing Nears Maturity
feed.summary: The Defiance Quantum ETF (QTUM) has experienced a significant 73% surge over the last year, managing $3.7 billion in assets with a 5-star Morningstar rating. The fund diversifies across 84 companies in the quantum and machine-learning supply chain to mitigate volatility, employing a modified equal-weight strategy. Upcoming commercial catalysts, such as Honeywell's Quantinuum IPO and emerging revenue from quantum optimization linked to AI energy demands, are expected to further drive the industry's growth, with McKinsey projecting the market to reach $850 billion by 2040.

feed.title: Why Is Lululemon Stock Crashing and is it a Buying Opportunity?
feed.summary: The article discusses the recent drop in Lululemon Athletica Inc. stock, attributing it to macroeconomic headwinds and trade barriers. It also features a promotion for The Motley Fool's Stock Advisor, which did not include Lululemon among its top 10 stock picks, suggesting other investment opportunities with high past returns from companies like Netflix and Nvidia.

feed.title: A Look At SL Green Realty (SLG) Valuation After Its Recent 18.2% One Month Share Price Gain
feed.summary: SL Green Realty (SLG) has seen an 18.2% share price increase over the past month, despite longer-term declines. The stock is considered undervalued by some at $42.41, with an estimated intrinsic value near $51.83, supported by potential growth from Manhattan office demand and new developments. However, its P/S ratio of 3.2x, compared to an industry average of 1.9x, raises questions about whether good news is already priced in.

feed.title: What CF Industries Holdings (CF)'s Maintained Dividend and Capital Returns Signal for Shareholders
feed.summary: CF Industries Holdings (CF) recently announced a maintained quarterly dividend of US$0.50 per share, following strong 2025 operating achievements including US$1.70 billion returned to shareholders. While these actions signal stability and support the company's investment narrative focused on global nitrogen fertilizer demand, cost advantages, and low-carbon ammonia initiatives, the core investment drivers remain nitrogen pricing and execution risks of large capital projects. Investors should also consider the potential for downside if nitrogen prices weaken or project costs overrun, as some analysts project revenue drops.

feed.title: Citi’s AI Push With Sky And Arc Meets Valuation And Growth Debate
feed.summary: Citi has launched two new AI initiatives: Sky, an AI-powered virtual advisor for wealth management, and Arc, a platform for deploying AI agents internally to automate complex tasks. These initiatives, along with Citi's recognition in digital asset adoption, highlight the bank's increasing focus on technology to enhance client services and operational efficiency. Investors are now evaluating how these AI platforms will impact Citi's long-term operating model, adoption rates, and its current valuation.

feed.title: Tractor Supply Slips as Investors Continue to Weigh Q1 Results and a Wave of Price-target Cuts
feed.summary: Tractor Supply (TSCO) shares fell after its first-quarter earnings report, which saw a decline in comparable store sales and led to multiple analysts lowering their price targets for the stock. Despite reporting an EPS beat and reiterating its full-year guidance, investors are reacting to the sales slowdown and a more cautious outlook from major financial institutions.

feed.title: Insider Sell Alert: Vishnu Venkatesh Sells 2,275 Shares of Sanmi
feed.summary: Vishnu Venkatesh, an insider at Sanmina Corp (SANM), sold 2,275 shares of the company on April 30, 2026. This transaction brings his total ownership to 18,500 shares, and it is part of a pattern where he has sold 6,163 shares in the past year without any purchases. Sanmina Corp's stock is currently trading at $212.8, making it significantly overvalued with a price-to-GF-Value ratio of 1.83.

feed.title: Grupo Supervielle S.A. (NYSE:SUPV) Short Interest Up 25.1% in April
feed.summary: Short interest in Grupo Supervielle S.A. (NYSE:SUPV) significantly increased by 25.1% in April, reaching 2,726,869 shares, representing about 3.1% of the shares sold short. This rise coincides with multiple analyst downgrades, including JPMorgan Chase & Co. cutting its price target to $11 and other firms issuing "sell" or "strong sell" ratings. Despite a consensus "Hold" rating and a $13 price target from MarketBeat, the company reported a negative EPS last quarter, a negative return on equity, and a negative net margin, with its shares trading at $7.89.

feed.title: Rogers (NYSE: ROG) files Form 144 for proposed restricted share sales
feed.summary: Rogers Corporation (NYSE: ROG) has filed a Form 144, indicating proposed sales of restricted common stock. This filing details restricted stock lapses on specific dates in February 2026, totaling 830 shares, all of which are tied to equity compensation. A securities compliance analyst views this as a neutral, routine disclosure for the disposition of vested restricted shares.

feed.title: Rogers Corp SVP Larabee sells $112,805 in common stock
feed.summary: Brian Keith Larabee, SVP & GM - EMS at Rogers Corp, sold 830 shares of the company's common stock for $112,805. This insider transaction occurred while Rogers Corp stock neared its 52-week high, having returned 113% over the past year. Despite the sale, the company is considered undervalued by InvestingPro analysis and recently reported Q1 2026 EPS aligning with forecasts, though sales were slightly below expectations.

feed.title: Directors’ Trust tied to RLI (RLI) director reports restructuring of 482 shares
feed.summary: A Directors' Trust connected to RLI CORP director Debbie Sharell Roberts reported an "other" Form 4 transaction for 482.905 shares of RLI common stock at $51.77 per share. This restructuring move, classified as a non-derivative transaction (code J), leaves the trust indirectly holding 27,088.066 shares. The filing indicates an internal ownership change rather than a typical market buy or sell.

feed.title: Vista Gold outlines permit approvals through 2027 as it targets detailed engineering start in 2027
feed.summary: Vista Gold has provided an outline of its permit approvals, extending through 2027, as the company plans to initiate detailed engineering for its project in the same year. This strategic timeline indicates the company's progression towards project development and operational readiness.

feed.title: RB Global (RBA) director Sarah E. Raiss files Form 4 showing no share activity
feed.summary: RB Global Inc. director Sarah E. Raiss filed a Form 4, reporting no share activity. The filing indicates no purchases, sales, exercises, gifts, or other share transactions during the specified period. This results in a neutral impact and sentiment regarding insider trading for RBA.

feed.title: Regentis Biomaterials (NYSE: RGNT) seeks to sell 3.33M shares; $3.00 assumed
feed.summary: Regentis Biomaterials (NYSE: RGNT) has filed an F-1 registration statement to sell 3,333,334 Ordinary Shares at an assumed public offering price of $3.00 per share. The company is developing GelrinC, a regenerative medicine product for articular knee cartilage repair, which is currently undergoing a pivotal clinical trial. Regentis aims to use the net proceeds from this offering for further clinical development of GelrinC, research and development activities, operational readiness, and European market entry.

feed.title: Tesla Got $573 Million from SpaceX and xAI in 2025
feed.summary: Tesla generated over half a billion dollars in revenue in 2025 by selling products to Elon Musk's other companies, SpaceX and xAI. The bulk of this, $430.1 million, came from xAI purchasing Tesla Megapacks, while SpaceX contributed $143.3 million, reportedly including Cybertruck sales. This financial interchange highlights the intertwined operations and potential strategic collaborations between Musk's various ventures, even as Tesla faces challenges like Cybertruck sales.

feed.title: Bank of New York Mellon Corp Depositary Shs Repr 1/100th Non-Cum Red Perp Pfd Rg Ser G
feed.summary: This article provides financial information for Bank of New York Mellon Corp Depositary Shs Repr 1/100th Non-Cum Red Perp Pfd Rg Ser G (FINRA:BK4987243) on TradingView. It offers an overview of the company's financial position, including its balance sheet, assets, liabilities, and equity. The data is available in both annual and quarterly formats, with currency specified as USD.

feed.title: Bank of New York Mellon Corp Depositary Shs Repr 1/100th Non-Cum Red Perp Pfd Rg Ser G
feed.summary: This page provides financial statistics and data for Bank of New York Mellon Corp Depositary Shs Repr 1/100th Non-Cum Red Perp Pfd Rg Ser G (FINRA:BK4987243). It indicates that the company's financial overview, statements, statistics, dividends, earnings, and revenue data can be found here. Users interested in market capitalization, P/E ratio, EPS, ROI, and other financial ratios are directed to this hub.

feed.title: Rekor Systems Receives Nasdaq Notice for Bid Non-Compliance
feed.summary: Rekor Systems (REKR) has received a Nasdaq notice for non-compliance with the $1 minimum bid price rule, after its shares traded below that threshold for 30 consecutive business days. The company has until October 26, 2026, to regain compliance and may consider a reverse stock split. If compliance is not met, Rekor faces potential delisting from Nasdaq, which could create significant uncertainty for shareholders.

feed.title: Revolution Medicines (RVMD) Is Up 7.2% After Pancreatic Cancer Drug Shows Survival Benefit vs Chemotherapy
feed.summary: Revolution Medicines (RVMD) saw its stock rise 7.2% after reporting a statistically significant improvement in progression-free and overall survival for its oral RAS(ON) inhibitor, daraxonrasib, against standard chemotherapy in metastatic pancreatic cancer. Full Phase 3 data will be presented at the 2026 ASCO Annual Meeting. The company's investment narrative now hinges on translating strong trial outcomes for its RAS(ON) pipeline into approved products, with expected revenues of $1.0 billion and earnings of $148.6 million by 2029.

feed.title: Rekor Systems (REKR) flagged by Nasdaq for sub-$1 bid, faces compliance deadline
feed.summary: Rekor Systems (REKR) has received a notice from Nasdaq for failing to meet the minimum $1.00 bid price requirement, having traded below this threshold for 30 consecutive business days. The company has until October 26, 2026, to regain compliance, potentially through a reverse stock split. Failure to comply could lead to delisting proceedings, though Rekor may qualify for an extension or appeal the decision.

feed.title: Why Is Lululemon Stock Crashing and is it a Buying Opportunity?
feed.summary: Lululemon's stock is currently crashing primarily due to macroeconomic headwinds and trade barriers, which are causing gross profit margins to fall as tariffs bite. The article raises the question of whether this downturn represents a buying opportunity for investors. Analyst Parkev Tatevosian, CFA, suggests that the poor results are a direct consequence of these challenging economic conditions.

feed.title: Bank Of Montreal (NYSE:BMO) Sees Large Increase in Short Interest
feed.summary: Bank Of Montreal (NYSE:BMO) experienced a significant 24.1% increase in short interest during April, reaching 5,228,631 shares. Despite this rise in short positions, the bank reported strong fundamental performance, topping quarterly earnings expectations with $2.51 EPS and $7.21 billion in revenue, and it maintains a solid dividend yield. Institutional investors have also shown increased confidence, with several funds, including Qube Research and AQR Capital Management, substantially growing their stakes in BMO.
